caption: Figure 4.8. Domestic Wood Pellets Production
description: A bar chart showing domestic wood pellet production in Japan from 2014 to 2019, measured in 1,000 tonnes. Production shows a slight upward trend from 126 in 2014 to 147 in 2019.

caption: Figure 4-9. Average Cost, Insurance, and Freight Prices of Wood Pellets and Wood Chips
description: A line chart comparing the average CIF prices in Yen/tonne for wood pellets, coniferous wood chips, and non-coniferous wood chips from 2012 to 2020.
